prompt: 사용자 목록을 보여주는 테이블 페이지 만들어줘. 검색, 페이지네이션, 역할별 필터링이 필요해. API는 `/api/users`에서 가져와.
assertions: Response has three sections: Architecture Overview, Code Implementation, Review Points
Types/Schemas, Hooks, and Components are separated into distinct files or clearly labeled sections
No usage of 'any' type in TypeScript code
Uses shadcn/ui components (e.g., Table, Input, Select)
Each code block includes a file path comment
Uses TanStack Query (useQuery or useSuspenseQuery) for data fetching
Search, pagination, and filter logic are encapsulated in custom hooks
Uses Zod schema for API response validation
